name: distributed-ops-control-platform
description: Reference implementation of a distributed operations control platform

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:unit
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @ops/contracts && npm run build --workspace @ops/domain && npm run build --workspace @ops/ui
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @ops/api && npm run build --workspace @ops/simulator && npm run build --workspace @ops/web
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace @ops/domain && npm run test --workspace @ops/api && npm run test --workspace @ops/simulator && npm run test --workspace @ops/web
scripts.verify: npm run build:clean && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:start
scripts.ci: npm run verify && npm run audit
